authors_text: Zhengqing Pan,Ruiqian Li,Tian Gao,Zi Wang,Ping Liu,Siyuan Shen,Tao Wu,Jingyi Yu,Shiying Li
title: Onsite Non-Line-of-Sight Imaging via Online Calibrations
title_zh: 通过在线校准进行现场非视距成像
abstract: There has been an increasing interest in deploying non-line-of-sight (NLOS) imaging systems for recovering objects behind an obstacle. Existing solutions generally pre-calibrate the system before scanning the hidden objects. Onsite adjustments of the occluder, object and scanning pattern require re-calibration. We present an online calibration technique that directly decouples the acquired transients at onsite scanning into the LOS and hidden components. We use the former to directly (re)calibrate the system upon changes of scene/obstacle configurations, scanning regions, and scanning patterns whereas the latter for hidden object recovery via spatial, frequency or learning based techniques. Our technique avoids using auxiliary calibration apparatus such as mirrors or checkerboards and supports both laboratory validations and real-world deployments.

We use the former to directly (re)calibrate the system upon changes of scene/obstacle configurations, scanning regions, and scanning patterns whereas the latter for hidden object recovery via spatial, frequency or learning based techniques. Our technique avoids using auxiliary calibration apparatus such as mirrors or checkerboards and supports both laboratory validations and real-world deployments.
abstract_zh: 人们对部署非视距 (NLOS) 成像系统来恢复障碍物后面的物体越来越感兴趣。现有的解决方案通常在扫描隐藏物体之前对系统进行预校准。遮挡器、物体和扫描模式的现场调整需要重新校准。我们提出了一种在线校准技术，可将现场扫描时采集的瞬态直接解耦为 LOS 和隐藏组件。我们使用前者根据场景/障碍物配置、扫描区域和扫描模式的变化直接（重新）校准系统，而后者通过空间、频率或基于学习的技术来恢复隐藏对象。我们的技术避免使用镜子或棋盘等辅助校准设备，并支持实验室验证和实际部署。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线校准技术，通过实时分解现场获取的非视距成像信号，实现无需辅助设备的动态系统校准与隐藏物体恢复。
AI.motivation: 传统非视距成像需预校准且现场调整时需重新校准，依赖辅助设备限制了实际部署灵活性，亟需实时自适应解决方案。
AI.method: 直接分解现场采集的瞬态信号为直视距（LOS）与隐藏成分，利用LOS动态校准系统参数，通过空间/频率/学习方法恢复隐藏物体。
AI.result: 实验室验证与实际场景测试表明，该方法可有效支持扫描区域、障碍物配置及扫描模式的实时调整与成像。
AI.conclusion: 在线校准技术突破了传统预校准限制，为非视距成像系统提供了无需辅助设备的实时自适应解决方案，推动实际应用落地。

authors_text: Ibrahim Shoer,Bahadir K. Gunturk,Hasan F. Ates,Tuncer Baykas
title: Altitude Optimization of UAV Base Stations from Satellite Images Using Deep Neural Network
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络根据卫星图像优化无人机基站高度
abstract: It is expected that unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) will play a vital role in future communication systems. Optimum positioning of UAVs, serving as base stations, can be done through extensive field measurements or ray tracing simulations when the 3D model of the region of interest is available. In this paper, we present an alternative approach to optimize UAV base station altitude for a region. The approach is based on deep learning; specifically, a 2D satellite image of the target region is input to a deep neural network to predict path loss distributions for different UAV altitudes. The predicted path distributions are used to calculate the coverage in the region; and the optimum altitude, maximizing the coverage, is determined. The neural network is designed and trained to produce multiple path loss distributions in a single inference; thus, it is not necessary to train a separate network for each altitude.
summary: It is expected that unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) will play a vital role in future communication systems. Optimum positioning of UAVs, serving as base stations, can be done through extensive field measurements or ray tracing simulations when the 3D model of the region of interest is available. In this paper, we present an alternative approach to optimize UAV base station altitude for a region. The approach is based on deep learning; specifically, a 2D satellite image of the target region is input to a deep neural network to predict path loss distributions for different UAV altitudes. The predicted path distributions are used to calculate the coverage in the region; and the optimum altitude, maximizing the coverage, is determined. The neural network is designed and trained to produce multiple path loss distributions in a single inference; thus, it is not necessary to train a separate network for each altitude.
abstract_zh: 预计无人机（UAV）将在未来的通信系统中发挥至关重要的作用。当感兴趣区域的 3D 模型可用时，可以通过广泛的现场测量或射线追踪模拟来实现充当基站的无人机的最佳定位。在本文中，我们提出了一种优化区域无人机基站高度的替代方法。该方法基于深度学习；具体来说，目标区域的二维卫星图像被输入深度神经网络，以预测不同无人机高度的路径损耗分布。预测的路径分布用于计算区域的覆盖范围；并确定最佳高度，使覆盖范围最大化。神经网络经过设计和训练，可在一次推理中产生多个路径损耗分布；因此，没有必要为每个高度训练单独的网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的无人机基站高度优化方法，利用卫星图像预测路径损耗分布以最大化区域覆盖。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机基站定位依赖耗时的实地测量或需要3D模型的射线追踪模拟，而本文旨在提供一种更高效且无需3D模型的替代方案。
AI.method: 通过输入目标区域的2D卫星图像，设计深度神经网络一次性预测多组不同高度的路径损耗分布，进而计算覆盖范围并确定最优高度。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效预测路径损耗并准确确定最优高度，显著提升覆盖效率且无需单独训练多个网络。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的深度学习方法为无人机基站高度优化提供了高效、实用的新途径，适用于缺乏3D模型的实际场景。

authors_text: Xu Song,Yongbiao Xiao,Hui Li,Xiao-Jun Wu,Jun Sun,Vasile Palade
title: Res2NetFuse: A Novel Res2Net-based Fusion Method for Infrared and Visible Images
title_zh: Res2NetFuse：一种基于 Res2Net 的新型红外和可见光图像融合方法
comment: There are some errors that need to be corrected
comments: There are some errors that need to be corrected
abstract: The fusion of visible light and infrared images has garnered significant attention in the field of imaging due to its pivotal role in various applications, including surveillance, remote sensing, and medical imaging. Therefore, this paper introduces a novel fusion framework using Res2Net architecture, capturing features across diverse receptive fields and scales for effective extraction of global and local features. Our methodology is structured into three fundamental components: the first part involves the Res2Net-based encoder, followed by the second part, which encompasses the fusion layer, and finally, the third part, which comprises the decoder. The encoder based on Res2Net is utilized for extracting multi-scale features from the input image. Simultaneously, with a single image as input, we introduce a pioneering training strategy tailored for a Res2Net-based encoder. We further enhance the fusion process with a novel strategy based on the attention model, ensuring precise reconstruction by the decoder for the fused image. Experimental results unequivocally showcase our method's unparalleled fusion performance, surpassing existing techniques, as evidenced by rigorous subjective and objective evaluations.
summary: The fusion of visible light and infrared images has garnered significant attention in the field of imaging due to its pivotal role in various applications, including surveillance, remote sensing, and medical imaging. Therefore, this paper introduces a novel fusion framework using Res2Net architecture, capturing features across diverse receptive fields and scales for effective extraction of global and local features. Our methodology is structured into three fundamental components: the first part involves the Res2Net-based encoder, followed by the second part, which encompasses the fusion layer, and finally, the third part, which comprises the decoder. The encoder based on Res2Net is utilized for extracting multi-scale features from the input image. Simultaneously, with a single image as input, we introduce a pioneering training strategy tailored for a Res2Net-based encoder. We further enhance the fusion process with a novel strategy based on the attention model, ensuring precise reconstruction by the decoder for the fused image. Experimental results unequivocally showcase our method's unparalleled fusion performance, surpassing existing techniques, as evidenced by rigorous subjective and objective evaluations.
abstract_zh: 可见光和红外图像的融合由于其在监视、遥感和医学成像等各种应用中的关键作用而在成像领域引起了广泛关注。因此，本文引入了一种使用 Res2Net 架构的新型融合框架，捕获不同感受野和尺度的特征，以有效提取全局和局部特征。我们的方法由三个基本组成部分组成：第一部分涉及基于 Res2Net 的编码器，其次是包含融合层的第二部分，最后是包含解码器的第三部分。基于Res2Net的编码器用于从输入图像中提取多尺度特征。同时，以单个图像作为输入，我们引入了针对基于 Res2Net 的编码器量身定制的开创性训练策略。我们通过基于注意力模型的新策略进一步增强了融合过程，确保解码器对融合图像进行精确重建。实验结果明确展示了我们的方法无与伦比的融合性能，超越了现有技术，严格的主观和客观评估证明了这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Res2Net架构的新型红外与可见光图像融合方法Res2NetFuse，通过多尺度特征提取和注意力机制实现高质量图像融合。
AI.motivation: 红外与可见光图像融合在安防、遥感等领域具有重要意义，但现有方法在多尺度特征提取和精确重建方面仍存在不足，需改进融合效果。
AI.method: 方法分为三部分：基于Res2Net的多尺度特征编码器、结合注意力机制的融合层以及解码器。创新性地提出针对单图像输入的Res2Net编码器训练策略，并通过注意力模型优化融合过程。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在主观和客观评价指标上均优于现有技术，实现了更清晰的边缘保留和细节增强，验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: Res2NetFuse通过多尺度特征提取与注意力机制有效提升了图像融合质量，为多模态图像处理提供了新思路，具有广泛的应用前景。

search_text: Res2NetFuse: A Novel Res2Net-based Fusion Method for Infrared and Visible Images Res2NetFuse：一种基于 Res2Net 的新型红外和可见光图像融合方法 The fusion of visible light and infrared images has garnered significant attention in the field of imaging due to its pivotal role in various applications, including surveillance, remote sensing, and medical imaging. Therefore, this paper introduces a novel fusion framework using Res2Net architecture, capturing features across diverse receptive fields and scales for effective extraction of global and local features. Our methodology is structured into three fundamental components: the first part involves the Res2Net-based encoder, followed by the second part, which encompasses the fusion layer, and finally, the third part, which comprises the decoder. The encoder based on Res2Net is utilized for extracting multi-scale features from the input image. Simultaneously, with a single image as input, we introduce a pioneering training strategy tailored for a Res2Net-based encoder. We further enhance the fusion process with a novel strategy based on the attention model, ensuring precise reconstruction by the decoder for the fused image. Experimental results unequivocally showcase our method's unparalleled fusion performance, surpassing existing techniques, as evidenced by rigorous subjective and objective evaluations. 可见光和红外图像的融合由于其在监视、遥感和医学成像等各种应用中的关键作用而在成像领域引起了广泛关注。因此，本文引入了一种使用 Res2Net 架构的新型融合框架，捕获不同感受野和尺度的特征，以有效提取全局和局部特征。我们的方法由三个基本组成部分组成：第一部分涉及基于 Res2Net 的编码器，其次是包含融合层的第二部分，最后是包含解码器的第三部分。基于Res2Net的编码器用于从输入图像中提取多尺度特征。同时，以单个图像作为输入，我们引入了针对基于 Res2Net 的编码器量身定制的开创性训练策略。我们通过基于注意力模型的新策略进一步增强了融合过程，确保解码器对融合图像进行精确重建。实验结果明确展示了我们的方法无与伦比的融合性能，超越了现有技术，严格的主观和客观评估证明了这一点。 本文提出基于Res2Net架构的新型红外与可见光图像融合方法Res2NetFuse，通过多尺度特征提取和注意力机制实现高质量图像融合。 Xu Song,Yongbiao Xiao,Hui Li,Xiao-Jun Wu,Jun Sun,Vasile Palade cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR

authors_text: Fahad Aljehani,Ibrahima N'Doye,Micaela S. Justo,John E. Majoris,Michael L. Berumen,Taous-Meriem Laleg-Kirati
title: Spatial Distribution Patterns of Clownfish in Recirculating Aquaculture Systems
title_zh: 循环水养殖系统中小丑鱼的空间分布格局
abstract: Successful aquaculture systems can reduce the pressure and help secure the most diverse and productive Red Sea coral reef ecosystem to maintain a healthy and functional ecosystem within a sustainable blue economy. Interestingly, recirculating aquaculture systems are currently emerging in fish farm production practices. On the other hand, monitoring and detecting fish behaviors provide essential information on fish welfare and contribute to an intelligent production in global aquaculture. This work proposes an efficient approach to analyze the spatial distribution status and motion patterns of juvenile clownfish \textit{(Amphiprion bicinctus)} maintained in aquaria at three stocking densities (1, 5, and 10 individuals/aquarium). The estimated displacement is crucial in assessing the dispersion and velocity to express the clownfish's spatial distribution and movement behavior in a recirculating aquaculture system. Indeed, we aim to compute the velocity, magnitude, and turning angle using an optical flow method to assist aquaculturists in efficiently monitoring and identifying fish behavior. We test the system design on a database containing two days of video streams of juvenile clownfish maintained in aquaria. The proposed displacement estimation reveals good performance in measuring clownfish's motion and dispersion characteristics leading to assessing the potential signs of stress behaviors. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed technique for quantifying variation in clownfish activity levels between recordings taken in the morning and afternoon at different stocking densities. It provides practical baseline support for online predicting and monitoring feeding behavior in ornamental fish aquaculture.

abstract_zh: 成功的水产养殖系统可以减轻压力，并有助于确保红海珊瑚礁生态系统最多样化和生产力最高，从而在可持续的蓝色经济中维持健康和功能齐全的生态系统。有趣的是，循环水产养殖系统目前正在养鱼场生产实践中出现。另一方面，监测和检测鱼类行为可以提供有关鱼类福利的重要信息，并有助于全球水产养殖的智能化生产。这项工作提出了一种有效的方法来分析在三种放养密度（1、5 和 10 条/水族箱）的水族箱中维持的幼年小丑鱼 \textit{(Amphiprion bicinctus)} 的空间分布状态和运动模式。估计的位移对于评估分散度和速度以表达循环水产养殖系统中小丑鱼的空间分布和运动行为至关重要。事实上，我们的目标是使用光流方法计算速度、幅度和转动角度，以帮助水产养殖者有效监测和识别鱼类行为。我们在一个数据库上测试了系统设计，该数据库包含水族馆中维护的幼年小丑鱼两天的视频流。所提出的位移估计揭示了在测量小丑鱼的运动和分散特征方面的良好性能，从而可以评估压力行为的潜在迹象。我们证明了所提出的技术在量化不同放养密度的早上和下午记录之间小丑鱼活动水平变化的有效性。它为在线预测和监测观赏鱼水产养殖中的摄食行为提供实用的基线支持。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过分析 clownfish（Amphiprion bicinctus）在循环水养殖系统中的空间分布和运动模式，提出了一种基于光流法的高效监测方法。
AI.motivation: 通过监测鱼类行为评估其福利状态，有助于实现可持续水产养殖，并为观赏鱼养殖中的喂养行为预测提供数据支持。
AI.method: 利用光流法计算幼年 clownfish 的速度、位移幅度和转向角度，分析不同密度（1、5、10 尾/水族箱）下的空间分布与运动特征。
AI.result: 该方法有效表征了 clownfish 的运动分散性和潜在压力行为迹象，并验证了早晚时段及不同密度下活动水平的差异。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为观赏鱼养殖中的在线行为监测和喂养预测提供了实用基准，有助于提升循环水养殖系统的智能化管理水平。

authors_text: Jonathan K. Vis,Mark A. Santcroos,Walter A. Kosters,Jeroen F. J. Laros
title: A Boolean Algebra for Genetic Variants
title_zh: 遗传变异的布尔代数
abstract: Beyond identifying genetic variants, we introduce a set of Boolean relations that allows for a comprehensive classification of the relations for every pair of variants by taking all minimal alignments into account. We present an efficient algorithm to compute these relations, including a novel way of efficiently computing all minimal alignments within the best theoretical complexity bounds. We show that for variants of the CFTR gene in dbSNP these relations are common and many non-trivial. Ultimately, we present an approach for the storing and indexing of variants in the context of a database that enables efficient querying for all these relations.
summary: Beyond identifying genetic variants, we introduce a set of Boolean relations that allows for a comprehensive classification of the relations for every pair of variants by taking all minimal alignments into account. We present an efficient algorithm to compute these relations, including a novel way of efficiently computing all minimal alignments within the best theoretical complexity bounds. We show that for variants of the CFTR gene in dbSNP these relations are common and many non-trivial. Ultimately, we present an approach for the storing and indexing of variants in the context of a database that enables efficient querying for all these relations.
abstract_zh: 除了识别遗传变异之外，我们还引入了一组布尔关系，通过考虑所有最小比对，可以对每对变异的关系进行全面分类。我们提出了一种有效的算法来计算这些关系，包括一种在最佳理论复杂度范围内有效计算所有最小对齐的新方法。我们表明，对于 dbSNP 中 CFTR 基因的变体，这些关系是常见的，而且很多都是重要的。最终，我们提出了一种在数据库上下文中存储和索引变体的方法，可以有效地查询所有这些关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于布尔代数的遗传变异分类方法，并开发了高效算法与数据库存储方案以处理变异间关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以全面分类遗传变异对的关系，且缺乏高效计算与存储方案，限制了变异间复杂关系的分析。
AI.method: 设计布尔关系模型与最小排列计算算法，结合理论最优复杂度的计算方法，并构建支持高效查询的数据库存储结构。
AI.result: 在CFTR基因dbSNP数据中验证了布尔关系的普遍性，证明该方法能有效处理大量非平凡变异关系。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为遗传变异关系分析提供了系统化工具，可提升变异数据的存储效率与复杂关系查询能力。

Ultimately, we present an approach for the storing and indexing of variants in the context of a database that enables efficient querying for all these relations. 除了识别遗传变异之外，我们还引入了一组布尔关系，通过考虑所有最小比对，可以对每对变异的关系进行全面分类。我们提出了一种有效的算法来计算这些关系，包括一种在最佳理论复杂度范围内有效计算所有最小对齐的新方法。我们表明，对于 dbSNP 中 CFTR 基因的变体，这些关系是常见的，而且很多都是重要的。最终，我们提出了一种在数据库上下文中存储和索引变体的方法，可以有效地查询所有这些关系。 本文提出了一种基于布尔代数的遗传变异分类方法，并开发了高效算法与数据库存储方案以处理变异间关系。 Jonathan K. authors_text: Farjad Malik,Simon Wouters,Ruben Cartuyvels,Erfan Ghadery,Marie-Francine Moens
title: Two-phase training mitigates class imbalance for camera trap image classification with CNNs
title_zh: 两阶段训练减轻了使用 CNN 进行相机陷阱图像分类的类别不平衡
abstract: By leveraging deep learning to automatically classify camera trap images, ecologists can monitor biodiversity conservation efforts and the effects of climate change on ecosystems more efficiently. Due to the imbalanced class-distribution of camera trap datasets, current models are biased towards the majority classes. As a result, they obtain good performance for a few majority classes but poor performance for many minority classes. We used two-phase training to increase the performance for these minority classes. We trained, next to a baseline model, four models that implemented a different versions of two-phase training on a subset of the highly imbalanced Snapshot Serengeti dataset. Our results suggest that two-phase training can improve performance for many minority classes, with limited loss in performance for the other classes. We find that two-phase training based on majority undersampling increases class-specific F1-scores up to 3.0%. We also find that two-phase training outperforms using only oversampling or undersampling by 6.1% in F1-score on average. Finally, we find that a combination of over- and undersampling leads to a better performance than using them individually.

abstract_zh: 通过利用深度学习对相机陷阱图像进行自动分类，生态学家可以更有效地监测生物多样性保护工作以及气候变化对生态系统的影响。由于相机陷阱数据集的类别分布不平衡，当前模型偏向于大多数类别。结果，他们在少数多数班级中取得了良好的成绩，但在许多少数班级中取得了较差的成绩。我们采用两阶段训练来提高这些少数群体的表现。除了基线模型之外，我们还训练了四个模型，这些模型在高度不平衡的塞伦盖蒂快照数据集的子集上实施了不同版本的两阶段训练。我们的结果表明，两阶段训练可以提高许多少数群体的表现，而其他群体的表现损失有限。我们发现基于多数欠采样的两阶段训练将特定类别的 F1 分数提高了 3.0%。我们还发现，两阶段训练的 F1 分数平均优于仅使用过采样或欠采样的 6.1%。最后，我们发现过采样和欠采样的组合比单独使用它们具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段训练方法，用于解决相机陷阱图像分类中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 相机陷阱数据集存在类别分布不均衡问题，导致现有模型偏向多数类，少数类分类效果差，影响生态监测效率。
AI.method: 在Snapshot Serengeti数据集子集上，除基线模型外，训练四种不同版本的两阶段训练模型，对比过采样、欠采样及组合采样效果。
AI.result: 两阶段训练使少数类F1分数提升3.0%，平均优于单一采样方法6.1%；过/欠采样组合效果优于单独使用。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段训练能有效提升少数类性能且不显著影响多数类，组合采样策略优于单一采样方法。

authors_text: Tiehua Zhang,Yuze Liu,Xin Chen,Xiaowei Huang,Feng Zhu,Xi Zheng
title: GPS: A Policy-driven Sampling Approach for Graph Representation Learning
title_zh: GPS：一种用于图表示学习的策略驱动的采样方法
abstract: Graph representation learning has drawn increasing attention in recent years, especially for learning the low dimensional embedding at both node and graph level for classification and recommendations tasks. To enable learning the representation on the large-scale graph data in the real world, numerous research has focused on developing different sampling strategies to facilitate the training process. Herein, we propose an adaptive Graph Policy-driven Sampling model (GPS), where the influence of each node in the local neighborhood is realized through the adaptive correlation calculation. Specifically, the selections of the neighbors are guided by an adaptive policy algorithm, contributing directly to the message aggregation, node embedding updating, and graph level readout steps. We then conduct comprehensive experiments against baseline methods on graph classification tasks from various perspectives. Our proposed model outperforms the existing ones by 3%-8% on several vital benchmarks, achieving state-of-the-art performance in real-world datasets.
summary: Graph representation learning has drawn increasing attention in recent years, especially for learning the low dimensional embedding at both node and graph level for classification and recommendations tasks. To enable learning the representation on the large-scale graph data in the real world, numerous research has focused on developing different sampling strategies to facilitate the training process. Herein, we propose an adaptive Graph Policy-driven Sampling model (GPS), where the influence of each node in the local neighborhood is realized through the adaptive correlation calculation. Specifically, the selections of the neighbors are guided by an adaptive policy algorithm, contributing directly to the message aggregation, node embedding updating, and graph level readout steps. We then conduct comprehensive experiments against baseline methods on graph classification tasks from various perspectives. Our proposed model outperforms the existing ones by 3%-8% on several vital benchmarks, achieving state-of-the-art performance in real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 近年来，图表示学习引起了越来越多的关注，特别是学习节点和图级别的低维嵌入以进行分类和推荐任务。为了能够学习现实世界中大规模图数据的表示，许多研究都集中在开发不同的采样策略以促进训练过程。在这里，我们提出了一种自适应图策略驱动采样模型（GPS），其中局部邻域中每个节点的影响是通过自适应相关性计算来实现的。具体来说，邻居的选择由自适应策略算法指导，直接有助于消息聚合、节点嵌入更新和图级读出步骤。然后，我们从不同角度对图分类任务的基线方法进行全面的实验。我们提出的模型在几个重要基准上比现有模型高出 3%-8%，在现实数据集中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于策略驱动的采样方法GPS，用于改进图表示学习中的邻居选择和嵌入更新过程。
AI.motivation: 现有采样策略难以有效捕捉大规模图数据中节点间的复杂关系，导致训练效率低或表示效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过自适应策略算法动态选择邻居节点，利用自适应相关性计算优化消息聚合和嵌入更新过程。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法3%-8%，在真实世界数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: GPS方法通过策略驱动的自适应采样有效提升了图表示学习效果，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Luciano Serafini,Raul Barbosa,Jasmin Grosinger,Luca Iocchi,Christian Napoli,Salvatore Rinzivillo,Jacques Robin,Alessandro Saffiotti,Teresa Scantamburlo,Peter Schueller,Paolo Traverso,Javier Vazquez-Salceda
title: On some Foundational Aspects of Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 以人为中心的人工智能的一些基本方面
abstract: The burgeoning of AI has prompted recommendations that AI techniques should be "human-centered". However, there is no clear definition of what is meant by Human Centered Artificial Intelligence, or for short, HCAI. This paper aims to improve this situation by addressing some foundational aspects of HCAI. To do so, we introduce the term HCAI agent to refer to any physical or software computational agent equipped with AI components and that interacts and/or collaborates with humans. This article identifies five main conceptual components that participate in an HCAI agent: Observations, Requirements, Actions, Explanations and Models. We see the notion of HCAI agent, together with its components and functions, as a way to bridge the technical and non-technical discussions on human-centered AI. In this paper, we focus our analysis on scenarios consisting of a single agent operating in dynamic environments in presence of humans.

abstract_zh: 人工智能的蓬勃发展促使人们建议人工智能技术应该“以人为中心”。然而，对于“以人为中心的人工智能”（Human Centered Artificial Intelligence，简称 HCAI）的含义，目前还没有明确的定义。本文旨在通过解决 HCAI 的一些基本问题来改善这种情况。为此，我们引入术语 HCAI 代理来指代配备 AI 组件并与人类交互和/或协作的任何物理或软件计算代理。本文确定了参与 HCAI 代理的五个主要概念组件：观察、要求、操作、解释和模型。我们将 HCAI 代理的概念及其组件和功能视为桥接以人为中心的人工智能的技术和非技术讨论的一种方式。在本文中，我们重点分析由在人类存在的动态环境中运行的单个代理组成的场景。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过引入HCAI代理及其五个核心组件（观察、需求、行动、解释和模型），明确人本人工智能（HCAI）的基础概念框架。
AI.motivation: 当前对人本人工智能（HCAI）缺乏清晰定义，导致技术与非技术讨论难以统一，需建立基础理论框架以促进跨领域协作。
AI.method: 提出HCAI代理概念，将其分解为五个核心组件，并通过单代理动态环境场景分析其交互机制与功能。
AI.result: 构建了包含观察、需求、行动、解释和模型的HCAI代理理论框架，为技术实现与伦理讨论提供统一基础。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效弥合了技术实现与人文关怀的讨论鸿沟，为人本AI的系统设计与评估提供了理论依据。

search_text: On some Foundational Aspects of Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence 以人为中心的人工智能的一些基本方面 The burgeoning of AI has prompted recommendations that AI techniques should be "human-centered". However, there is no clear definition of what is meant by Human Centered Artificial Intelligence, or for short, HCAI. This paper aims to improve this situation by addressing some foundational aspects of HCAI. To do so, we introduce the term HCAI agent to refer to any physical or software computational agent equipped with AI components and that interacts and/or collaborates with humans. This article identifies five main conceptual components that participate in an HCAI agent: Observations, Requirements, Actions, Explanations and Models. We see the notion of HCAI agent, together with its components and functions, as a way to bridge the technical and non-technical discussions on human-centered AI. In this paper, we focus our analysis on scenarios consisting of a single agent operating in dynamic environments in presence of humans. 人工智能的蓬勃发展促使人们建议人工智能技术应该“以人为中心”。然而，对于“以人为中心的人工智能”（Human Centered Artificial Intelligence，简称 HCAI）的含义，目前还没有明确的定义。本文旨在通过解决 HCAI 的一些基本问题来改善这种情况。为此，我们引入术语 HCAI 代理来指代配备 AI 组件并与人类交互和/或协作的任何物理或软件计算代理。本文确定了参与 HCAI 代理的五个主要概念组件：观察、要求、操作、解释和模型。我们将 HCAI 代理的概念及其组件和功能视为桥接以人为中心的人工智能的技术和非技术讨论的一种方式。在本文中，我们重点分析由在人类存在的动态环境中运行的单个代理组成的场景。 本文旨在通过引入HCAI代理及其五个核心组件（观察、需求、行动、解释和模型），明确人本人工智能（HCAI）的基础概念框架。 Luciano Serafini,Raul Barbosa,Jasmin Grosinger,Luca Iocchi,Christian Napoli,Salvatore Rinzivillo,Jacques Robin,Alessandro Saffiotti,Teresa Scantamburlo,Peter Schueller,Paolo Traverso,Javier Vazquez-Salceda cs.AI

authors_text: Junhan Kim,Kyuhong Shim,Byonghyo Shim
title: Semantic Feature Extraction for Generalized Zero-shot Learning
title_zh: 广义零样本学习的语义特征提取
abstract: Generalized zero-shot learning (GZSL) is a technique to train a deep learning model to identify unseen classes using the attribute. In this paper, we put forth a new GZSL technique that improves the GZSL classification performance greatly. Key idea of the proposed approach, henceforth referred to as semantic feature extraction-based GZSL (SE-GZSL), is to use the semantic feature containing only attribute-related information in learning the relationship between the image and the attribute. In doing so, we can remove the interference, if any, caused by the attribute-irrelevant information contained in the image feature. To train a network extracting the semantic feature, we present two novel loss functions, 1) mutual information-based loss to capture all the attribute-related information in the image feature and 2) similarity-based loss to remove unwanted attribute-irrelevant information. From extensive experiments using various datasets, we show that the proposed SE-GZSL technique outperforms conventional GZSL approaches by a large margin.

abstract_zh: 广义零样本学习（GZSL）是一种训练深度学习模型以使用属性识别未见过的类的技术。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 GZSL 技术，大大提高了 GZSL 分类性能。该方法的关键思想是使用仅包含属性相关信息的语义特征来学习图像和属性之间的关系，以下称为基于语义特征提取的 GZSL (SE-GZSL)。这样做，我们可以消除图像特征中包含的属性无关信息造成的干扰（如果有的话）。为了训练提取语义特征的网络，我们提出了两种新颖的损失函数，1）基于相互信息的损失来捕获图像特征中所有属性相关的信息，2）基于相似性的损失来删除不需要的属性不相关信息。通过使用各种数据集的大量实验，我们表明所提出的 SE-GZSL 技术大大优于传统的 GZSL 方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于语义特征提取的广义零样本学习方法（SE-GZSL），以提升未见类别的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统GZSL方法受图像特征中与属性无关信息的干扰，导致分类性能受限，需提取纯属性相关语义特征以提高准确性。
AI.method: 设计SE-GZSL方法，引入互信息损失（捕获属性相关特征）和相似度损失（去除无关信息），训练网络提取纯净语义特征。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验显示，SE-GZSL显著优于传统GZSL方法，分类性能提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义特征提取与双损失函数设计，有效去除干扰信息，显著提升GZSL分类性能，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Claudio Bonesana,Francesca Mangili,Alessandro Antonucci
title: ADAPQUEST: A Software for Web-Based Adaptive Questionnaires based on Bayesian Networks
title_zh: ADAPQUEST：基于贝叶斯网络的网络自适应问卷软件
comment: Presented at the IJCAI 2021 Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Education
comments: Presented at the IJCAI 2021 Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Education
abstract: We introduce ADAPQUEST, a software tool written in Java for the development of adaptive questionnaires based on Bayesian networks. Adaptiveness is intended here as the dynamical choice of the question sequence on the basis of an evolving model of the skill level of the test taker. Bayesian networks offer a flexible and highly interpretable framework to describe such testing process, especially when coping with multiple skills. ADAPQUEST embeds dedicated elicitation strategies to simplify the elicitation of the questionnaire parameters. An application of this tool for the diagnosis of mental disorders is also discussed together with some implementation details.
summary: We introduce ADAPQUEST, a software tool written in Java for the development of adaptive questionnaires based on Bayesian networks. Adaptiveness is intended here as the dynamical choice of the question sequence on the basis of an evolving model of the skill level of the test taker. Bayesian networks offer a flexible and highly interpretable framework to describe such testing process, especially when coping with multiple skills. ADAPQUEST embeds dedicated elicitation strategies to simplify the elicitation of the questionnaire parameters. An application of this tool for the diagnosis of mental disorders is also discussed together with some implementation details.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 ADAPQUEST，这是一个用 Java 编写的软件工具，用于开发基于贝叶斯网络的自适应问卷。这里的适应性是指基于考生技能水平的演变模型对问题序列的动态选择。贝叶斯网络提供了一个灵活且高度可解释的框架来描述此类测试过程，特别是在处理多种技能时。 ADAPQUEST 嵌入了专用的启发策略来简化问卷参数的启发。还讨论了该工具在精神障碍诊断中的应用以及一些实现细节。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于贝叶斯网络的自适应问卷软件ADAPQUEST，用于动态调整问题顺序以适应测试者的技能水平。
AI.motivation: 传统问卷无法根据测试者实时调整问题顺序，而贝叶斯网络能灵活处理多技能评估，需开发专用工具实现该框架。
AI.method: 采用Java开发ADAPQUEST，结合贝叶斯网络建模与参数简化策略，支持动态问题序列生成及多技能诊断应用。
AI.result: 成功实现ADAPQUEST工具，并验证其在心理障碍诊断场景中的可行性，提供参数调整与实现细节说明。
AI.conclusion: ADAPQUEST为基于贝叶斯网络的自适应评估提供了有效工具，适用于复杂技能场景的动态测试需求。

authors_text: Junyu Shi,Wei Wan,Shengshan Hu,Jianrong Lu,Leo Yu Zhang
title: Challenges and Approaches for Mitigating Byzantine Attacks in Federated Learning
title_zh: 联邦学习中缓解拜占庭攻击的挑战和方法
comment: The paper has been accepted by the 21st IEEE International Conference on Trust, Security and Privacy in Computing and Communications (IEEE TrustCom-22)
comments: The paper has been accepted by the 21st IEEE International Conference on Trust, Security and Privacy in Computing and Communications (IEEE TrustCom-22)
abstract: Recently emerged federated learning (FL) is an attractive distributed learning framework in which numerous wireless end-user devices can train a global model with the data remained autochthonous. Compared with the traditional machine learning framework that collects user data for centralized storage, which brings huge communication burden and concerns about data privacy, this approach can not only save the network bandwidth but also protect the data privacy. Despite the promising prospect, byzantine attack, an intractable threat in conventional distributed network, is discovered to be rather efficacious against FL as well. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive investigation of the state-of-the-art strategies for defending against byzantine attacks in FL. We first provide a taxonomy for the existing defense solutions according to the techniques they used, followed by an across-the-board comparison and discussion. Then we propose a new byzantine attack method called weight attack to defeat those defense schemes, and conduct experiments to demonstrate its threat. The results show that existing defense solutions, although abundant, are still far from fully protecting FL. Finally, we indicate possible countermeasures for weight attack, and highlight several challenges and future research directions for mitigating byzantine attacks in FL.

abstract_zh: 最近出现的联邦学习（FL）是一种有吸引力的分布式学习框架，其中众多无线最终用户设备可以训练全局模型，而数据仍然是本地的。与传统机器学习框架收集用户数据进行集中存储带来的巨大通信负担和数据隐私担忧相比，这种方式不仅可以节省网络带宽，还可以保护数据隐私。尽管前景广阔，但传统分布式网络中的棘手威胁拜占庭攻击被发现对 FL 也相当有效。在本文中，我们对佛罗里达州防御拜占庭攻击的最先进策略进行了全面调查。我们首先根据现有的防御解决方案所使用的技术对它们进行分类，然后进行全面的比较和讨论。然后我们提出了一种新的拜占庭攻击方法，称为权重攻击来击败这些防御方案，并进行实验来证明其威胁。结果表明，现有的防御解决方案虽然丰富，但仍远未完全保护 FL。最后，我们指出了权重攻击的可能对策，并强调了减轻 FL 拜占庭攻击的几个挑战和未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究联邦学习中拜占庭攻击的防御策略，提出新型权重攻击方法并验证现有防御方案的不足。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习虽能保护隐私，但拜占庭攻击威胁严重，现有防御方案存在明显缺陷需进一步研究。
AI.method: 通过分类比较现有防御技术，提出基于模型权重的新型攻击方法，并进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明现有防御方案无法有效抵御新型权重攻击，暴露联邦学习系统的安全脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 需开发更鲁棒的防御机制，重点应对新型攻击手段，并探索拜占庭攻击的长期防御方向。

search_text: Challenges and Approaches for Mitigating Byzantine Attacks in Federated Learning 联邦学习中缓解拜占庭攻击的挑战和方法 Recently emerged federated learning (FL) is an attractive distributed learning framework in which numerous wireless end-user devices can train a global model with the data remained autochthonous. Compared with the traditional machine learning framework that collects user data for centralized storage, which brings huge communication burden and concerns about data privacy, this approach can not only save the network bandwidth but also protect the data privacy. Despite the promising prospect, byzantine attack, an intractable threat in conventional distributed network, is discovered to be rather efficacious against FL as well. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive investigation of the state-of-the-art strategies for defending against byzantine attacks in FL. We first provide a taxonomy for the existing defense solutions according to the techniques they used, followed by an across-the-board comparison and discussion. Then we propose a new byzantine attack method called weight attack to defeat those defense schemes, and conduct experiments to demonstrate its threat. The results show that existing defense solutions, although abundant, are still far from fully protecting FL. Finally, we indicate possible countermeasures for weight attack, and highlight several challenges and future research directions for mitigating byzantine attacks in FL. 最近出现的联邦学习（FL）是一种有吸引力的分布式学习框架，其中众多无线最终用户设备可以训练全局模型，而数据仍然是本地的。与传统机器学习框架收集用户数据进行集中存储带来的巨大通信负担和数据隐私担忧相比，这种方式不仅可以节省网络带宽，还可以保护数据隐私。尽管前景广阔，但传统分布式网络中的棘手威胁拜占庭攻击被发现对 FL 也相当有效。在本文中，我们对佛罗里达州防御拜占庭攻击的最先进策略进行了全面调查。我们首先根据现有的防御解决方案所使用的技术对它们进行分类，然后进行全面的比较和讨论。然后我们提出了一种新的拜占庭攻击方法，称为权重攻击来击败这些防御方案，并进行实验来证明其威胁。结果表明，现有的防御解决方案虽然丰富，但仍远未完全保护 FL。最后，我们指出了权重攻击的可能对策，并强调了减轻 FL 拜占庭攻击的几个挑战和未来的研究方向。 本文系统研究联邦学习中拜占庭攻击的防御策略，提出新型权重攻击方法并验证现有防御方案的不足。 Junyu Shi,Wei Wan,Shengshan Hu,Jianrong Lu,Leo Yu Zhang cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Kacper Sokol,Peter Flach
title: Explainability Is in the Mind of the Beholder: Establishing the Foundations of Explainable Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 可解释性取决于旁观者的想法：建立可解释人工智能的基础
abstract: Explainable artificial intelligence and interpretable machine learning are research domains growing in importance. Yet, the underlying concepts remain somewhat elusive and lack generally agreed definitions. While recent inspiration from social sciences has refocused the work on needs and expectations of human recipients, the field still misses a concrete conceptualisation. We take steps towards addressing this challenge by reviewing the philosophical and social foundations of human explainability, which we then translate into the technological realm. In particular, we scrutinise the notion of algorithmic black boxes and the spectrum of understanding determined by explanatory processes and explainees' background knowledge. This approach allows us to define explainability as (logical) reasoning applied to transparent insights (into, possibly black-box, predictive systems) interpreted under background knowledge and placed within a specific context -- a process that engenders understanding in a selected group of explainees. We then employ this conceptualisation to revisit strategies for evaluating explainability as well as the much disputed trade-off between transparency and predictive power, including its implications for ante-hoc and post-hoc techniques along with fairness and accountability established by explainability. We furthermore discuss components of the machine learning workflow that may be in need of interpretability, building on a range of ideas from human-centred explainability, with a particular focus on explainees, contrastive statements and explanatory processes. Our discussion reconciles and complements current research to help better navigate open questions -- rather than attempting to address any individual issue -- thus laying a solid foundation for a grounded discussion and future progress of explainable artificial intelligence and interpretable machine learning.

abstract_zh: 可解释的人工智能和可解释的机器学习是日益重要的研究领域。然而，基本概念仍然有些难以捉摸，并且缺乏普遍认可的定义。尽管最近来自社会科学的灵感使工作重新集中在人类接受者的需求和期望上，但该领域仍然缺少具体的概念化。我们通过回顾人类可解释性的哲学和社会基础，采取措施应对这一挑战，然后将其转化为技术领域。特别是，我们仔细审查了算法黑匣子的概念以及由解释过程和被解释者的背景知识决定的理解范围。这种方法使我们能够将可解释性定义为（逻辑）推理，应用于在背景知识下解释并置于特定上下文中的透明见解（可能是黑盒预测系统）——这是一个在选定的被解释者群体中产生理解的过程。然后，我们利用这种概念化来重新审视评估可解释性的策略，以及透明度和预测能力之间备受争议的权衡，包括其对事前和事后技术的影响，以及由可解释性建立的公平性和问责制。我们还讨论了机器学习工作流程中可能需要可解释性的组件，建立在以人为中心的可解释性的一系列想法的基础上，特别关注被解释者、对比陈述和解释过程。我们的讨论协调并补充了当前的研究，以帮助更好地解决悬而未决的问题，而不是试图解决任何个别问题，从而为可解释的人工智能和可解释的机器学习的扎根讨论和未来进展奠定了坚实的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过哲学和社会学视角建立可解释人工智能的基础，明确其概念并探讨相关评估方法和权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 当前可解释AI缺乏统一定义和理论框架，需从哲学和社会学角度重新构建概念以指导实践。
AI.method: 通过回顾哲学与社会学基础，分析算法黑箱及解释过程，提出基于背景知识和情境的可解释性定义，并用于评估策略与权衡分析。
AI.result: 提出可解释性定义，重新评估评估方法，探讨透明度与预测力的权衡，并整合现有研究以指导未来方向。
AI.conclusion: 建立坚实的理论基础，促进可解释AI和可解释机器学习的未来发展，并协调不同研究方向。

authors_text: Andreas Pfadler,Rong Zhu,Wei Chen,Botong Huang,Tianjing Zeng,Bolin Ding,Jingren Zhou
title: Baihe: SysML Framework for AI-driven Databases
title_zh: Baihe：人工智能驱动数据库的 SysML 框架
abstract: We present Baihe, a SysML Framework for AI-driven Databases. Using Baihe, an existing relational database system may be retrofitted to use learned components for query optimization or other common tasks, such as e.g. learned structure for indexing. To ensure the practicality and real world applicability of Baihe, its high level architecture is based on the following requirements: separation from the core system, minimal third party dependencies, Robustness, stability and fault tolerance, as well as stability and configurability. Based on the high level architecture, we then describe a concrete implementation of Baihe for PostgreSQL and present example use cases for learned query optimizers. To serve both practitioners, as well as researchers in the DB and AI4DB community Baihe for PostgreSQL will be released under open source license.
summary: We present Baihe, a SysML Framework for AI-driven Databases. Based on the high level architecture, we then describe a concrete implementation of Baihe for PostgreSQL and present example use cases for learned query optimizers. To serve both practitioners, as well as researchers in the DB and AI4DB community Baihe for PostgreSQL will be released under open source license.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Baihe，一个用于人工智能驱动数据库的 SysML 框架。使用 Baihe，可以对现有的关系数据库系统进行改造，以使用学习组件进行查询优化或其他常见任务，例如查询。学习的索引结构。为了保证百合的实用性和现实世界的适用性，其高层架构基于以下要求：与核心系统分离、最小化第三方依赖、健壮性、稳定性和容错性以及稳定性和可配置性。然后，基于高层架构，我们描述了 Baihe for PostgreSQL 的具体实现，并展示了学习查询优化器的示例用例。为了服务 DB 和 AI4DB 社区的从业者和研究人员，Baihe for PostgreSQL 将在开源许可下发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Baihe框架，通过SysML实现AI驱动的数据库系统，使现有关系型数据库能够集成机器学习组件以优化查询和索引结构。
AI.motivation: 传统数据库系统在处理复杂查询和大规模数据时存在效率瓶颈，而AI技术可提供更优的优化策略，但缺乏与现有系统的兼容性框架。
AI.method: 设计基于SysML的分层架构，确保与核心数据库解耦、依赖最小化，并实现鲁棒性和可配置性；以PostgreSQL为实例展示框架实现与应用场景。
AI.result: 成功构建Baihe框架并开源，验证了其在PostgreSQL中支持学习型查询优化器等场景的可行性与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: Baihe为数据库领域提供了兼顾实用性与研究价值的AI集成方案，推动了AI4DB技术的工程化落地与社区发展。

search_text: Baihe: SysML Framework for AI-driven Databases Baihe：人工智能驱动数据库的 SysML 框架 We present Baihe, a SysML Framework for AI-driven Databases. Using Baihe, an existing relational database system may be retrofitted to use learned components for query optimization or other common tasks, such as e.g. learned structure for indexing. To ensure the practicality and real world applicability of Baihe, its high level architecture is based on the following requirements: separation from the core system, minimal third party dependencies, Robustness, stability and fault tolerance, as well as stability and configurability. Based on the high level architecture, we then describe a concrete implementation of Baihe for PostgreSQL and present example use cases for learned query optimizers. To serve both practitioners, as well as researchers in the DB and AI4DB community Baihe for PostgreSQL will be released under open source license. 我们推出了 Baihe，一个用于人工智能驱动数据库的 SysML 框架。使用 Baihe，可以对现有的关系数据库系统进行改造，以使用学习组件进行查询优化或其他常见任务，例如查询。学习的索引结构。为了保证百合的实用性和现实世界的适用性，其高层架构基于以下要求：与核心系统分离、最小化第三方依赖、健壮性、稳定性和容错性以及稳定性和可配置性。然后，基于高层架构，我们描述了 Baihe for PostgreSQL 的具体实现，并展示了学习查询优化器的示例用例。为了服务 DB 和 AI4DB 社区的从业者和研究人员，Baihe for PostgreSQL 将在开源许可下发布。 本文提出Baihe框架，通过SysML实现AI驱动的数据库系统，使现有关系型数据库能够集成机器学习组件以优化查询和索引结构。 Andreas Pfadler,Rong Zhu,Wei Chen,Botong Huang,Tianjing Zeng,Bolin Ding,Jingren Zhou cs.DB,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Edith Cohen,Haim Kaplan,Yishay Mansour,Uri Stemmer,Eliad Tsfadia
title: Differentially-Private Clustering of Easy Instances
title_zh: 简单实例的差分私有集群
comment: A preliminary version appeared in ICML 2021
comments: A preliminary version appeared in ICML 2021
abstract: Clustering is a fundamental problem in data analysis. In differentially private clustering, the goal is to identify $k$ cluster centers without disclosing information on individual data points. Despite significant research progress, the problem had so far resisted practical solutions. In this work we aim at providing simple implementable differentially private clustering algorithms that provide utility when the data is "easy," e.g., when there exists a significant separation between the clusters. We propose a framework that allows us to apply non-private clustering algorithms to the easy instances and privately combine the results. We are able to get improved sample complexity bounds in some cases of Gaussian mixtures and $k$-means. We complement our theoretical analysis with an empirical evaluation on synthetic data.

In this work we aim at providing simple implementable differentially private clustering algorithms that provide utility when the data is "easy," e.g., when there exists a significant separation between the clusters. We propose a framework that allows us to apply non-private clustering algorithms to the easy instances and privately combine the results. We are able to get improved sample complexity bounds in some cases of Gaussian mixtures and $k$-means. We complement our theoretical analysis with an empirical evaluation on synthetic data.
abstract_zh: 聚类是数据分析中的一个基本问题。在差异私有聚类中，目标是在不泄露各个数据点信息的情况下识别 $k$ 聚类中心。尽管研究取得了重大进展，但该问题迄今为止仍缺乏实际解决方案。在这项工作中，我们的目标是提供简单的可实现的差异私有聚类算法，该算法在数据“简单”时（例如，当聚类之间存在显着分离时）提供实用性。我们提出了一个框架，允许我们将非私有聚类算法应用于简单实例并私有地组合结果。在高斯混合和 $k$ 均值的某些情况下，我们能够获得改进的样本复杂度界限。我们通过对合成数据的实证评估来补充我们的理论分析。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种适用于聚类问题中'易处理实例'的差分隐私算法，当数据簇间存在显著分离时，能够在保护个体隐私的同时实现有效聚类。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量研究，但差分隐私聚类问题仍缺乏实用解决方案。针对数据簇间分离度高的'易处理实例'，现有方法未能有效结合非隐私算法的优势。
AI.method: 提出一个通用框架，将非隐私聚类算法应用于易处理实例，并通过隐私保护机制组合结果，从而在保证隐私性的同时提升实用性和效率。
AI.result: 在高斯混合模型和k-means场景下改进了样本复杂度理论界，并通过合成数据验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为差分隐私聚类提供了实用化路径，尤其适用于簇间分离度高的数据场景，理论分析与实验结果相互支持。

authors_text: Chuanqing Zhuang,Zhengda Lu,Yiqun Wang,Jun Xiao,Ying Wang
title: ACDNet: Adaptively Combined Dilated Convolution for Monocular Panorama Depth Estimation
title_zh: ACDNet：用于单目全景深度估计的自适应组合扩张卷积
abstract: Depth estimation is a crucial step for 3D reconstruction with panorama images in recent years. Panorama images maintain the complete spatial information but introduce distortion with equirectangular projection. In this paper, we propose an ACDNet based on the adaptively combined dilated convolution to predict the dense depth map for a monocular panoramic image. Specifically, we combine the convolution kernels with different dilations to extend the receptive field in the equirectangular projection. Meanwhile, we introduce an adaptive channel-wise fusion module to summarize the feature maps and get diverse attention areas in the receptive field along the channels. Due to the utilization of channel-wise attention in constructing the adaptive channel-wise fusion module, the network can capture and leverage the cross-channel contextual information efficiently. Finally, we conduct depth estimation experiments on three datasets (both virtual and real-world) and the experimental results demonstrate that our proposed ACDNet substantially outperforms the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. Our codes and model parameters are accessed in https://github.com/zcq15/ACDNet.
summary: Depth estimation is a crucial step for 3D reconstruction with panorama images in recent years. Panorama images maintain the complete spatial information but introduce distortion with equirectangular projection. In this paper, we propose an ACDNet based on the adaptively combined dilated convolution to predict the dense depth map for a monocular panoramic image. Specifically, we combine the convolution kernels with different dilations to extend the receptive field in the equirectangular projection. Meanwhile, we introduce an adaptive channel-wise fusion module to summarize the feature maps and get diverse attention areas in the receptive field along the channels. Due to the utilization of channel-wise attention in constructing the adaptive channel-wise fusion module, the network can capture and leverage the cross-channel contextual information efficiently. Finally, we conduct depth estimation experiments on three datasets (both virtual and real-world) and the experimental results demonstrate that our proposed ACDNet substantially outperforms the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. Our codes and model parameters are accessed in https://github.com/zcq15/ACDNet.
abstract_zh: 深度估计是近年来全景图像3D重建的关键步骤。全景图像保留了完整的空间信息，但通过等距柱状投影引入了失真。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于自适应组合扩张卷积的 ACDNet 来预测单目全景图像的密集深度图。具体来说，我们将具有不同膨胀的卷积核结合起来，以扩展等距矩形投影中的感受野。同时，我们引入了自适应通道融合模块来总结特征图并获得沿通道的感受野中的不同关注区域。由于在构建自适应通道融合模块时利用通道注意，网络可以有效地捕获和利用跨通道上下文信息。最后，我们在三个数据集（虚拟和现实世界）上进行深度估计实验，实验结果表明我们提出的 ACDNet 大大优于当前最先进的（SOTA）方法。我们的代码和模型参数可在 https://github.com/zcq15/ACDNet 中访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ACDNet网络，通过自适应结合扩张卷积实现单目全景图像的密集深度图预测。
AI.motivation: 全景图像虽保留完整空间信息但存在等距投影失真，现有方法难以有效处理全景图像的深度估计问题。
AI.method: 结合不同扩张率卷积核扩展感受野，引入自适应通道融合模块利用通道注意力机制整合跨通道上下文信息。
AI.result: 在三个数据集（虚拟与真实场景）实验中，ACDNet显著优于当前最先进的深度估计方法。
AI.conclusion: ACDNet通过自适应扩张卷积与通道融合机制有效解决了全景图像深度估计问题，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Hai Su,Shan Yang,Shuqing Zhang,Songsen Yu
title: A Color Image Steganography Based on Frequency Sub-band Selection
title_zh: 基于频率子带选择的彩色图像隐写术
abstract: Color image steganography based on deep learning is the art of hiding information in the color image. Among them, image hiding steganography(hiding image with image) has attracted much attention in recent years because of its great steganographic capacity. However, images generated by image hiding steganography may show some obvious color distortion or artificial texture traces. We propose a color image steganographic model based on frequency sub-band selection to solve the above problems. Firstly, we discuss the relationship between the characteristics of different color spaces/frequency sub-bands and the generated image quality. Then, we select the B channel of the RGB image as the embedding channel and the high-frequency sub-band as the embedding domain. DWT(discrete wavelet transformation) transforms B channel information and secret gray image into frequency domain information, and then the secret image is embedded and extracted in the frequency domain. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that images generated by our model have better image quality, and the imperceptibility is significantly increased.

abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的彩色图像隐写术是在彩色图像中隐藏信息的艺术。其中，图像隐藏隐写术（以图像隐藏图像）因其强大的隐写能力近年来备受关注。然而，通过图像隐藏隐写术生成的图像可能会出现一些明显的颜色失真或人造纹理痕迹。我们提出了一种基于频率子带选择的彩色图像隐写模型来解决上述问题。首先，我们讨论不同颜色空间/频率子带的特性与生成的图像质量之间的关系。然后，我们选择RGB图像的B通道作为嵌入通道，高频子带作为嵌入域。 DWT（离散小波变换）将B通道信息和秘密灰度图像变换为频域信息，然后在频域嵌入和提取秘密图像。综合实验表明，我们的模型生成的图像具有更好的图像质量，并且不可感知性显着提高。

AI.motivation: 现有图像隐写方法在隐藏信息时易产生明显颜色失真或人工纹理痕迹，需解决隐写图像的视觉质量和隐蔽性问题。

AI.result: 实验表明，该模型生成的图像质量更优，隐蔽性显著提升，有效减少颜色失真和纹理痕迹。

authors_text: Seyum Assefa Abebe,Claudio Lucchese,Salvatore Orlando
title: EiFFFeL: Enforcing Fairness in Forests by Flipping Leaves
title_zh: EiFFeL：通过翻转树叶确保森林公平
abstract: Nowadays Machine Learning (ML) techniques are extensively adopted in many socially sensitive systems, thus requiring to carefully study the fairness of the decisions taken by such systems. Many approaches have been proposed to address and to make sure there is no bias against individuals or specific groups which might originally come from biased training datasets or algorithm design. In this regard, we propose a fairness enforcing approach called EiFFFeL:Enforcing Fairness in Forests by Flipping Leaves which exploits tree-based or leaf-based post-processing strategies to relabel leaves of selected decision trees of a given forest. Experimental results show that our approach achieves a user defined group fairness degree without losing a significant amount of accuracy.
summary: Nowadays Machine Learning (ML) techniques are extensively adopted in many socially sensitive systems, thus requiring to carefully study the fairness of the decisions taken by such systems. Many approaches have been proposed to address and to make sure there is no bias against individuals or specific groups which might originally come from biased training datasets or algorithm design. In this regard, we propose a fairness enforcing approach called EiFFFeL:Enforcing Fairness in Forests by Flipping Leaves which exploits tree-based or leaf-based post-processing strategies to relabel leaves of selected decision trees of a given forest. Experimental results show that our approach achieves a user defined group fairness degree without losing a significant amount of accuracy.
abstract_zh: 如今，机器学习（ML）技术在许多社会敏感系统中广泛采用，因此需要仔细研究此类系统做出的决策的公平性。人们提出了许多方法来解决并确保对个人或特定群体不存在偏见，这些偏见最初可能来自有偏见的训练数据集或算法设计。在这方面，我们提出了一种名为 EiFFFeL:Enforcing Fairness in Forests by Flipping Leaves 的公平执行方法，该方法利用基于树或基于叶子的后处理策略来重新标记给定森林的选定决策树的叶子。实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了用户定义的群体公平程度，而没有损失大量的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为EiFFFeL的方法，通过翻转随机森林中决策树的叶子节点来强制实现群体公平性。
AI.motivation: 机器学习系统在敏感场景中存在偏见风险，现有方法难以在保持准确性的同时有效消除算法或数据集的偏见。
AI.method: 采用基于树或叶子节点的后处理策略，通过重新标记选定决策树的叶子节点来调整预测结果。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可在不显著损失模型准确性的情况下，达到用户设定的群体公平性要求。
AI.conclusion: EiFFFeL提供了一种有效平衡公平性与准确性的随机森林后处理方法，为敏感场景下的模型部署提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dohyun Jang,Jaehyun Yoo,Clark Youngdong Son,H. Jin Kim
title: Fully Distributed Informative Planning for Environmental Learning with Multi-Robot Systems
title_zh: 使用多机器人系统进行环境学习的完全分布式信息规划
abstract: This paper proposes a cooperative environmental learning algorithm working in a fully distributed manner. A multi-robot system is more effective for exploration tasks than a single robot, but it involves the following challenges: 1) online distributed learning of environmental map using multiple robots; 2) generation of safe and efficient exploration path based on the learned map; and 3) maintenance of the scalability with respect to the number of robots. To this end, we divide the entire process into two stages of environmental learning and path planning. Distributed algorithms are applied in each stage and combined through communication between adjacent robots. The environmental learning algorithm uses a distributed Gaussian process, and the path planning algorithm uses a distributed Monte Carlo tree search. As a result, we build a scalable system without the constraint on the number of robots. Simulation results demonstrate the performance and scalability of the proposed system. Moreover, a real-world-dataset-based simulation validates the utility of our algorithm in a more realistic scenario.
summary: This paper proposes a cooperative environmental learning algorithm working in a fully distributed manner. A multi-robot system is more effective for exploration tasks than a single robot, but it involves the following challenges: 1) online distributed learning of environmental map using multiple robots; 2) generation of safe and efficient exploration path based on the learned map; and 3) maintenance of the scalability with respect to the number of robots. To this end, we divide the entire process into two stages of environmental learning and path planning. Distributed algorithms are applied in each stage and combined through communication between adjacent robots. The environmental learning algorithm uses a distributed Gaussian process, and the path planning algorithm uses a distributed Monte Carlo tree search. As a result, we build a scalable system without the constraint on the number of robots. Simulation results demonstrate the performance and scalability of the proposed system. Moreover, a real-world-dataset-based simulation validates the utility of our algorithm in a more realistic scenario.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种以完全分布式方式工作的协作环境学习算法。多机器人系统比单个机器人更有效地完成探索任务，但它面临以下挑战：1）使用多个机器人在线分布式学习环境地图； 2）基于学习到的地图生成安全高效的探索路径； 3）维持机器人数量的可扩展性。为此，我们将整个过程分为环境学习和路径规划两个阶段。每个阶段都应用分布式算法，并通过相邻机器人之间的通信进行组合。环境学习算法采用分布式高斯过程，路径规划算法采用分布式蒙特卡罗树搜索。因此，我们构建了一个可扩展的系统，不受机器人数量的限制。仿真结果证明了所提出系统的性能和可扩展性。此外，基于现实世界数据集的模拟验证了我们的算法在更现实的场景中的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全分布式协作环境学习算法，解决多机器人系统在环境探索中的分布式学习、路径规划及可扩展性挑战。
AI.motivation: 多机器人系统虽在探索任务中更高效，但面临分布式环境地图学习、安全路径生成及规模扩展等核心问题，现有方法难以兼顾效率与可扩展性。
AI.method: 将任务分为环境学习与路径规划两阶段：环境学习采用分布式高斯过程，路径规划使用分布式蒙特卡洛树搜索，通过相邻机器人通信协同整合。
AI.result: 仿真验证了系统的性能与可扩展性，现实数据集测试进一步证明算法在复杂场景中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法构建了无机器人数量限制的可扩展系统，为多机器人环境探索提供了高效且分布式的解决方案。

Moreover, a real-world-dataset-based simulation validates the utility of our algorithm in a more realistic scenario. 本文提出了一种以完全分布式方式工作的协作环境学习算法。多机器人系统比单个机器人更有效地完成探索任务，但它面临以下挑战：1）使用多个机器人在线分布式学习环境地图； 2）基于学习到的地图生成安全高效的探索路径； 3）维持机器人数量的可扩展性。为此，我们将整个过程分为环境学习和路径规划两个阶段。每个阶段都应用分布式算法，并通过相邻机器人之间的通信进行组合。环境学习算法采用分布式高斯过程，路径规划算法采用分布式蒙特卡罗树搜索。因此，我们构建了一个可扩展的系统，不受机器人数量的限制。仿真结果证明了所提出系统的性能和可扩展性。此外，基于现实世界数据集的模拟验证了我们的算法在更现实的场景中的实用性。 本文提出一种全分布式协作环境学习算法，解决多机器人系统在环境探索中的分布式学习、路径规划及可扩展性挑战。 Dohyun Jang,Jaehyun Yoo,Clark Youngdong Son,H. authors_text: Khen Elimelech,Vadim Indelman
title: Efficient Belief Space Planning in High-Dimensional State Spaces using PIVOT: Predictive Incremental Variable Ordering Tactic
title_zh: 使用 PIVOT 在高维状态空间中进行高效置信空间规划：预测增量变量排序策略
comment: Submitted by invitation to the International Journal of Robotics Research (IJRR), 2021
comments: Submitted by invitation to the International Journal of Robotics Research (IJRR), 2021
abstract: In this work, we examine the problem of online decision making under uncertainty, which we formulate as planning in the belief space. Maintaining beliefs (i.e., distributions) over high-dimensional states (e.g., entire trajectories) was not only shown to significantly improve accuracy, but also allows planning with information-theoretic objectives, as required for the tasks of active SLAM and information gathering. Nonetheless, planning under this "smoothing" paradigm holds a high computational complexity, which makes it challenging for online solution. Thus, we suggest the following idea: before planning, perform a standalone state variable reordering procedure on the initial belief, and "push forwards" all the predicted loop closing variables. Since the initial variable order determines which subset of them would be affected by incoming updates, such reordering allows us to minimize the total number of affected variables, and reduce the computational complexity of candidate evaluation during planning. We call this approach PIVOT: Predictive Incremental Variable Ordering Tactic. Applying this tactic can also improve the state inference efficiency; if we maintain the PIVOT order after the planning session, then we should similarly reduce the cost of loop closures, when they actually occur. To demonstrate its effectiveness, we applied PIVOT in a realistic active SLAM simulation, where we managed to significantly reduce the computation time of both the planning and inference sessions. The approach is applicable to general distributions, and induces no loss in accuracy.

abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了不确定性下的在线决策问题，我们将其表述为信念空间中的规划。维持高维状态（例如整个轨迹）的信念（即分布）不仅可以显着提高准确性，而且还可以根据主动 SLAM 和信息收集任务的需要，根据信息理论目标进行规划。尽管如此，这种“平滑”范式下的规划具有很高的计算复杂性，这使得在线解决方案具有挑战性。因此，我们建议以下想法：在规划之前，对初始信念执行独立的状态变量重新排序过程，并“前推”所有预测的闭环变量。由于初始变量顺序决定了其中的哪个子集将受到传入更新的影响，因此这种重新排序使我们能够最大限度地减少受影响变量的总数，并降低规划期间候选评估的计算复杂性。我们将这种方法称为 PIVOT：预测增量变量排序策略。应用该策略还可以提高状态推理效率；如果我们在计划会议之后维持 PIVOT 顺序，那么当环路闭合实际发生时，我们应该类似地降低环路闭合的成本。为了证明其有效性，我们在现实的主动 SLAM 模拟中应用了 PIVOT，我们成功地显着减少了规划和推理会话的计算时间。该方法适用于一般分布，并且不会导致准确性损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PIVOT的方法，用于在高维状态空间中高效进行信念空间规划，以解决在线决策中的不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统信念空间规划在高维状态下计算复杂度高，难以实现实时在线解决方案，尤其在主动SLAM等任务中需要平衡计算效率与信息理论目标。
AI.method: 通过预处理阶段对初始信念进行状态变量重排序，并预测性地将闭环变量前推，从而最小化规划过程中受影响的变量数量，降低候选评估的计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在主动SLAM仿真中，PIVOT显著减少了规划和推理阶段的计算时间，且不损失精度。
AI.conclusion: PIVOT方法通过变量重排序策略有效降低了高维信念空间规划的计算负担，适用于通用分布且具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Kejiang Chen,Xianhan Zeng,Qichao Ying,Sheng Li,Zhenxing Qian,Xinpeng Zhang
title: Invertible Image Dataset Protection
title_zh: 可逆图像数据集保护
comment: Submitted to ICME 2022. Authors are from University of Science and Technology of China, Fudan University, China. A potential extended version of this work is under way
comments: Submitted to ICME 2022. Authors are from University of Science and Technology of China, Fudan University, China. A potential extended version of this work is under way
abstract: Deep learning has achieved enormous success in various industrial applications. Companies do not want their valuable data to be stolen by malicious employees to train pirated models. Nor do they wish the data analyzed by the competitors after using them online. We propose a novel solution for dataset protection in this scenario by robustly and reversibly transform the images into adversarial images. We develop a reversible adversarial example generator (RAEG) that introduces slight changes to the images to fool traditional classification models. Even though malicious attacks train pirated models based on the defensed versions of the protected images, RAEG can significantly weaken the functionality of these models. Meanwhile, the reversibility of RAEG ensures the performance of authorized models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RAEG can better protect the data with slight distortion against adversarial defense than previous methods.

Nor do they wish the data analyzed by the competitors after using them online. We develop a reversible adversarial example generator (RAEG) that introduces slight changes to the images to fool traditional classification models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RAEG can better protect the data with slight distortion against adversarial defense than previous methods.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在各种工业应用中取得了巨大的成功。公司不希望他们的宝贵数据被恶意员工窃取来训练盗版模型。他们也不希望竞争对手在网上使用后分析数据。我们提出了一种在这种情况下保护数据集的新颖解决方案，通过稳健且可逆地将图像转换为对抗性图像。我们开发了一种可逆对抗性示例生成器（RAEG），它对图像进行了细微的改变，以欺骗传统的分类模型。尽管恶意攻击基于受保护图像的防御版本来训练盗版模型，但 RAEG 仍可以显着削弱这些模型的功能。同时，RAEG的可逆性保证了授权模型的性能。大量实验表明，与之前的方法相比，RAEG 可以更好地保护轻微失真的数据免受对抗性防御的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可逆对抗样本生成方法（RAEG），通过轻微修改图像保护数据集，防止恶意模型窃取数据同时不影响授权模型性能。
AI.motivation: 企业担忧数据被恶意员工或竞争对手盗用训练模型，需在不影响合法使用前提下保护数据安全。
AI.method: 开发可逆对抗示例生成器（RAEG），对图像进行鲁棒且可逆的微小扰动，使恶意模型失效而授权模型仍可正常工作。
AI.result: 实验表明RAEG在轻微失真下比现有方法更有效保护数据，显著削弱盗版模型性能且保持授权模型准确性。
AI.conclusion: RAEG通过可逆对抗转换实现了数据保护与合法使用的平衡，为工业场景提供有效防御方案。

authors_text: Donghwan Lee,Do Wan Kim
title: Control Theoretic Analysis of Temporal Difference Learning
title_zh: 时间差分学习的控制理论分析
comment: The contents of this paper have some overlaps with some other arxiv paper we have submitted. Therefore, this paper is redundant in my opinion
comments: The contents of this paper have some overlaps with some other arxiv paper we have submitted. Therefore, this paper is redundant in my opinion
abstract: The goal of this manuscript is to conduct a controltheoretic analysis of Temporal Difference (TD) learning algorithms. TD-learning serves as a cornerstone in the realm of reinforcement learning, offering a methodology for approximating the value function associated with a given policy in a Markov Decision Process. Despite several existing works that have contributed to the theoretical understanding of TD-learning, it is only in recent years that researchers have been able to establish concrete guarantees on its statistical efficiency. In this paper, we introduce a finite-time, control-theoretic framework for analyzing TD-learning, leveraging established concepts from the field of linear systems control. Consequently, this paper provides additional insights into the mechanics of TD learning and the broader landscape of reinforcement learning, all while employing straightforward analytical tools derived from control theory.

TD-learning serves as a cornerstone in the realm of reinforcement learning, offering a methodology for approximating the value function associated with a given policy in a Markov Decision Process. Despite several existing works that have contributed to the theoretical understanding of TD-learning, it is only in recent years that researchers have been able to establish concrete guarantees on its statistical efficiency. authors_text: Kaiqiang Yu,Cheng Long,Shengxin Liu,Da Yan
title: Efficient Algorithms for Maximal k-Biplex Enumeration
title_zh: 最大 k-Biplex 枚举的高效算法
comment: This paper has been accepted by SIGMOD 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by SIGMOD 2022
abstract: Mining maximal subgraphs with cohesive structures from a bipartite graph has been widely studied. One important cohesive structure on bipartite graphs is k-biplex, where each vertex on one side disconnects at most k vertices on the other side. In this paper, we study the maximal k-biplex enumeration problem which enumerates all maximal k-biplexes. Existing methods suffer from efficiency and/or scalability issues and have the time of waiting for the next output exponential w.r.t. the size of the input bipartite graph (i.e., an exponential delay). In this paper, we adopt a reverse search framework called bTraversal, which corresponds to a depth-first search (DFS) procedure on an implicit solution graph on top of all maximal k-biplexes. We then develop a series of techniques for improving and implementing this framework including (1) carefully selecting an initial solution to start DFS, (2) pruning the vast majority of links from the solution graph of bTraversal, and (3) implementing abstract procedures of the framework. The resulting algorithm is called iTraversal, which has its underlying solution graph significantly sparser than (around 0.1% of) that of bTraversal. Besides, iTraversal provides a guarantee of polynomial delay. Our experimental results on real and synthetic graphs, where the largest one contains more than one billion edges, show that our algorithm is up to four orders of magnitude faster than existing algorithms.

authors_text: Hardik Patel,Purvi Koringa
title: The impacts of various parameters on learning process and machine learning based performance prediction in online coding competitions
title_zh: 在线编码竞赛中各种参数对学习过程和基于机器学习的表现预测的影响
abstract: Various parameters affect the performance of students in online coding competitions. Students' behavior, approach, emotions, and problem difficulty levels significantly impact their performance in online coding competitions. We have organized two coding competitions to understand the effects of the above parameters. We have done the online survey at the end of each coding competition, and it contains questions related to the behavior, approach, and emotions of students during online coding competitions. Students are evaluated based on the time and status of the submissions. We have carried out a detailed analysis to address the impact of students' approach, behavior, and emotions on the learning process in online coding competitions. Two difficulty levels are proposed based on the time and status of submissions. The impact of difficulty levels on machine learning-based performance prediction is presented in this research work. Based on time, the coding solution submissions have two classes "Less than 15 minutes" and "More than 15 minutes". There are three classes, "Complete solution", "Partial solution", and "Not submitted at all," based on the submission status. The appropriate approaches are found for both the coding competitions to submit the solution within 15 minutes. Machine learning classifiers are trained and evaluated for the above classification problems. The impacts of mood, emotions, and difficulty levels on the learning process are also assessed by comparing the results of machine learning models for both coding competitions.

abstract_zh: 各种参数都会影响学生在在线编程竞赛中的表现。学生的行为、方法、情绪和问题难度水平会显着影响他们在在线编程竞赛中的表现。我们组织了两次编码比赛来了解上述参数的影响。我们在每次编程比赛结束时都会进行在线调查，其中包含与学生在在线编程比赛中的行为、方法和情绪相关的问题。根据提交的时间和状态对学生进行评估。我们针对在线编程竞赛中学生的方法、行为和情绪对学习过程的影响进行了详细的分析。根据提交的时间和状态提出两个难度级别。这项研究工作介绍了难度级别对基于机器学习的性能预测的影响。根据时间，编码解决方案提交分为“少于15分钟”和“超过15分钟”两类。根据提交状态，分为“完整解决方案”、“部分解决方案”和“根本未提交”三类。两次编码竞赛都找到了合适的方法，在 15 分钟内提交解决方案。机器学习分类器针对上述分类问题进行训练和评估。通过比较两次编程竞赛的机器学习模型的结果，还评估了心情、情绪和难度水平对学习过程的影响。

AI.tldr: 研究在线编程竞赛中学生行为、方法、情绪及题目难度对学习过程和机器学习性能预测的影响。
AI.motivation: 理解学生在在线编程竞赛中的表现受多种因素影响，旨在通过分析这些参数优化学习过程并提升机器学习预测性能。
AI.method: 组织两次编程竞赛，通过问卷调查收集学生行为、方法和情绪数据，根据提交时间和状态分类题目难度，训练并评估机器学习分类器。
AI.result: 发现学生方法、行为和情绪对学习过程有显著影响，确定了快速提交的有效策略，并评估了情绪和难度对机器学习模型性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 参数对学习过程和预测模型有显著影响，建议结合情绪分析和难度调整优化在线编程教育，并需进一步研究多因素交互作用。

method: 组织两次编程竞赛，通过问卷调查收集学生行为、方法和情绪数据，根据提交时间和状态分类题目难度，训练并评估机器学习分类器。
result: 发现学生方法、行为和情绪对学习过程有显著影响，确定了快速提交的有效策略，并评估了情绪和难度对机器学习模型性能的影响。
conclusion: 参数对学习过程和预测模型有显著影响，建议结合情绪分析和难度调整优化在线编程教育，并需进一步研究多因素交互作用。
search_text: The impacts of various parameters on learning process and machine learning based performance prediction in online coding competitions 在线编码竞赛中各种参数对学习过程和基于机器学习的表现预测的影响 Various parameters affect the performance of students in online coding competitions. Students' behavior, approach, emotions, and problem difficulty levels significantly impact their performance in online coding competitions. We have organized two coding competitions to understand the effects of the above parameters. We have done the online survey at the end of each coding competition, and it contains questions related to the behavior, approach, and emotions of students during online coding competitions. Students are evaluated based on the time and status of the submissions. We have carried out a detailed analysis to address the impact of students' approach, behavior, and emotions on the learning process in online coding competitions. Two difficulty levels are proposed based on the time and status of submissions. The impact of difficulty levels on machine learning-based performance prediction is presented in this research work. Based on time, the coding solution submissions have two classes "Less than 15 minutes" and "More than 15 minutes". There are three classes, "Complete solution", "Partial solution", and "Not submitted at all," based on the submission status. The appropriate approaches are found for both the coding competitions to submit the solution within 15 minutes. Machine learning classifiers are trained and evaluated for the above classification problems. The impacts of mood, emotions, and difficulty levels on the learning process are also assessed by comparing the results of machine learning models for both coding competitions. 各种参数都会影响学生在在线编程竞赛中的表现。学生的行为、方法、情绪和问题难度水平会显着影响他们在在线编程竞赛中的表现。我们组织了两次编码比赛来了解上述参数的影响。我们在每次编程比赛结束时都会进行在线调查，其中包含与学生在在线编程比赛中的行为、方法和情绪相关的问题。根据提交的时间和状态对学生进行评估。我们针对在线编程竞赛中学生的方法、行为和情绪对学习过程的影响进行了详细的分析。根据提交的时间和状态提出两个难度级别。这项研究工作介绍了难度级别对基于机器学习的性能预测的影响。根据时间，编码解决方案提交分为“少于15分钟”和“超过15分钟”两类。根据提交状态，分为“完整解决方案”、“部分解决方案”和“根本未提交”三类。两次编码竞赛都找到了合适的方法，在 15 分钟内提交解决方案。机器学习分类器针对上述分类问题进行训练和评估。通过比较两次编程竞赛的机器学习模型的结果，还评估了心情、情绪和难度水平对学习过程的影响。 研究在线编程竞赛中学生行为、方法、情绪及题目难度对学习过程和机器学习性能预测的影响。 Hardik Patel,Purvi Koringa cs.HC,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Karttikeya Mangalam,Rohin Garg
title: Overcoming Mode Collapse with Adaptive Multi Adversarial Training
title_zh: 通过自适应多重对抗训练克服模式崩溃
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are a class of generative models used for various applications, but they have been known to suffer from the mode collapse problem, in which some modes of the target distribution are ignored by the generator. Investigative study using a new data generation procedure indicates that the mode collapse of the generator is driven by the discriminator's inability to maintain classification accuracy on previously seen samples, a phenomenon called Catastrophic Forgetting in continual learning. Motivated by this observation, we introduce a novel training procedure that adaptively spawns additional discriminators to remember previous modes of generation. On several datasets, we show that our training scheme can be plugged-in to existing GAN frameworks to mitigate mode collapse and improve standard metrics for GAN evaluation.
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are a class of generative models used for various applications, but they have been known to suffer from the mode collapse problem, in which some modes of the target distribution are ignored by the generator. Investigative study using a new data generation procedure indicates that the mode collapse of the generator is driven by the discriminator's inability to maintain classification accuracy on previously seen samples, a phenomenon called Catastrophic Forgetting in continual learning. Motivated by this observation, we introduce a novel training procedure that adaptively spawns additional discriminators to remember previous modes of generation. On several datasets, we show that our training scheme can be plugged-in to existing GAN frameworks to mitigate mode collapse and improve standard metrics for GAN evaluation.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）是一类用于各种应用的生成模型，但众所周知，它们会遭受模式崩溃问题，即目标分布的某些模式被生成器忽略。使用新的数据生成程序的调查研究表明，生成器的模式崩溃是由判别器无法维持对先前看到的样本的分类准确性所驱动的，这种现象在持续学习中被称为“灾难性遗忘”。受这一观察的启发，我们引入了一种新颖的训练程序，该程序自适应地产生额外的判别器来记住以前的生成模式。在多个数据集上，我们表明我们的训练方案可以插入现有的 GAN 框架，以减轻模式崩溃并改进 GAN 评估的标准指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应多对抗训练方法，通过引入额外判别器解决生成对抗网络（GANs）中的模式崩溃问题。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN训练中，判别器因灾难性遗忘导致无法保持对历史样本的分类准确率，从而引发生成器模式崩溃。
AI.method: 设计自适应机制动态生成额外判别器，强制其学习并保留先前生成模式，与主判别器协同训练。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证该方法可有效缓解模式崩溃，显著提升GAN的评估指标表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过多判别器协作机制，成功克服GAN训练中的模式崩溃问题，为改进生成模型提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tung-Wei Kuo
title: Minimizing $\ell_2$ Norm of Flow Time by Starvation Mitigation
title_zh: 通过饥饿缓解最小化 $\ell_2$ 流动时间范数
abstract: The assessment of a job's Quality of Service (QoS) often revolves around its flow time, also referred to as response time. This study delves into two fundamental objectives for scheduling jobs: the average flow time and the maximum flow time. While the Shortest Remaining Processing Time (SRPT) algorithm minimizes average flow time, it can result in job starvation, causing certain jobs to experience disproportionately long and unfair flow times. In contrast, the First-Come-First-Served (FCFS) algorithm minimizes the maximum flow time but may compromise the average flow time. To strike a balance between these two objectives, a common approach is to minimize the $\ell_2$ norm of flow time. SRPT and FCFS are $O(n^{\frac{1}{2}})$-competitive for this problem, where $n$ is the number of jobs. Prior to this work, no algorithm is known to achieve a competitive ratio better than SRPT and FCFS. In this paper, we use FCFS to mitigate the starvation caused by SRPT. Given a good estimate of $n$, we prove that this approach achieves a much better competitive ratio of $O(n^{\frac{1}{3}})$. Our results provide the first theoretical evidence that mitigating starvation in SRPT leads to a provable improvement in scheduling performance.

This study delves into two fundamental objectives for scheduling jobs: the average flow time and the maximum flow time. While the Shortest Remaining Processing Time (SRPT) algorithm minimizes average flow time, it can result in job starvation, causing certain jobs to experience disproportionately long and unfair flow times. In contrast, the First-Come-First-Served (FCFS) algorithm minimizes the maximum flow time but may compromise the average flow time. To strike a balance between these two objectives, a common approach is to minimize the $\ell_2$ norm of flow time. SRPT and FCFS are $O(n^{\frac{1}{2}})$-competitive for this problem, where $n$ is the number of jobs. Prior to this work, no algorithm is known to achieve a competitive ratio better than SRPT and FCFS. In this paper, we use FCFS to mitigate the starvation caused by SRPT. Given a good estimate of $n$, we prove that this approach achieves a much better competitive ratio of $O(n^{\frac{1}{3}})$. Our results provide the first theoretical evidence that mitigating starvation in SRPT leads to a provable improvement in scheduling performance.
abstract_zh: 对作业服务质量 (QoS) 的评估通常围绕其流动时间（也称为响应时间）。本研究深入研究了调度作业的两个基本目标：平均流动时间和最大流动时间。虽然最短剩余处理时间 (SRPT) 算法可以最大限度地减少平均流动时间，但它可能会导致作业匮乏，从而导致某些作业经历不成比例的长且不公平的流动时间。相比之下，先来先服务（FCFS）算法可以最小化最大流动时间，但可能会损害平均流动时间。为了在这两个目标之间取得平衡，一种常见的方法是最小化流动时间的$\ell_2$范数。 SRPT 和 FCFS 对于此问题的竞争性为 $O(n^{\frac{1}{2}})$，其中 $n$ 是作业数量。在这项工作之前，尚无已知算法能够比 SRPT 和 FCFS 实现更好的竞争比。在本文中，我们使用 FCFS 来减轻 SRPT 造成的饥饿。给定 $n$ 的良好估计，我们证明这种方法实现了更好的竞争比 $O(n^{\frac{1}{3}})$。我们的结果提供了第一个理论证据，证明减轻 SRPT 中的饥饿可以带来调度性能的可证明的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过缓解SRPT算法的饥饿问题，最小化流时间的ℓ₂范数，从而在平均流时间和最大流时间之间取得平衡。
AI.motivation: SRPT算法虽能最小化平均流时间，但会导致部分任务饥饿，产生不公平的长响应时间；而FCFS算法虽能最小化最大流时间，但可能牺牲平均流时间。现有算法无法在两者间取得更优平衡。
AI.method: 结合FCFS算法缓解SRPT的饥饿问题，在已知任务数量n的估计值前提下，设计混合调度策略并证明其竞争比为O(n^{1/3})。
AI.result: 提出的方法在理论层面证明了竞争比从原有O(n^{1/2})提升至O(n^{1/3})，首次验证了缓解饥饿可有效提升调度性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入FCFS缓解SRPT饥饿问题，本文为平衡平均与最大流时间提供了首个理论证明，展示了饥饿缓解对调度性能的实质性改进。
